import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut c = 0
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      c = v
    when None
      c = 0
    end
    if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
      if string.len(current) > 0
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(current) > 0
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ items: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for x in items
    mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for y in sorted
      if not inserted and x <= y
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
    end
    if not inserted
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
    end
    sorted = new_sorted
  end
  sorted
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line)
let sorted = sort_list(nums)

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
